text.converse.config.title: Converse Settings
text.converse.config.display.title: Display
text.converse.config.display.option.togg: Toggle chat visibility with a keybind
text.converse.config.display.option.noti: Show a message when the chat visibility is toggled via hotkey
text.converse.config.display.option.typi: Temporarily render the chat window while the chat screen is open, even if visibility is hidden
text.converse.config.appearance.title: Appearance
text.converse.config.appearance.option.s: Automatically tweak chat background width accordingly to each line's content
text.converse.config.appearance.option.r: Removes the chat message indicator icon
text.converse.config.appearance.option.e: Enable slide-in animation for new chat messages
text.converse.config.appearance.option.m: Duration of the message slide animation in milliseconds
text.converse.config.appearance.option.e: Enable slide-in animation for the chat input field
text.converse.config.appearance.option.t: Duration of the text field slide animation in milliseconds
